mapper.sql: c.id,c.region,c.name,c.description,c.cover_url,c.member_count,c.post_count,c.sort,c.status, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM circle_member cm WHERE cm.circle_id=c.id AND cm.user_id=#{userId}) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END joined_by_current_user
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle c WHERE c.region=#{region} AND c.status=1 AND c.is_deleted=FALSE AND #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM circle_member cm WHERE cm.circle_id=c.id AND cm.user_id=#{userId})
SELECT FROM circle c WHERE c.id=#{id} AND c.region=#{region} AND c.status=1 AND c.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id=#{circleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id=#{circleId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM circle_member WHERE circle_id=#{circleId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE circle SET member_count=CASE WHEN member_count>0 THEN member_count-1 ELSE 0 END,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{circleId}
mapper.select: SELECT member_count FROM circle WHERE id=#{circleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE circle SET post_count=(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post p WHERE p.circle_id=circle.id AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE),updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=(SELECT circle_id FROM post WHERE id=#{postId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle WHERE region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE AND status=#{status}AND name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')

SELECT id,region,name,description,cover_url,member_count,post_count,sort,status,FALSE joined_by_current_user FROM circle WHERE region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE AND status=#{status}AND name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') ORDER BY sort DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id,region,name,description,cover_url,member_count,post_count,sort,status,FALSE joined_by_current_user FROM circle WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle WHERE region=#{region} AND name=#{name} AND is_deleted=FALSE AND id<>#{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE circle SET name=#{name},description=#{description},cover_url=#{coverUrl},sort=#{sort},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
UPDATE circle SET status=#{status},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
